figures.caption: TABLE II. MAIN RESULTS ON TREC DL AND TREC NEUCLIR BENCHMARKS. WE REPORT NDCG@10 AND THE AVERAGE GENERATION LENGTH. THE BEST NDCG AND LOWEST LENGTH IN EACH BLOCK ARE BOLDED. '-' INDICATES NON-REASONING RERANKERS THAT OUTPUT ONLY A FIXED-LENGTH RANKING SEQUENCE.

Fig. 2. Comparison of reasoning traces. The Original Rank-K (top) repeatedly revisits settled decisions and slightly perturbs the ranking before reverting to its original choice, without introducing new evidence. Our Rank-KDistill (bottom) performs a brief check but proceeds confidently once the ranking stabilizes, avoiding circular deliberation.

Fig. 1. Reasoning length vs. ranking performance on TREC DL20. Despite a six-fold increase in average response length (from 835 to 5,131 tokens), nDCG@10 remains stagnant around 0.642, revealing a clear overthinking phenomenon.
